Backlog.title: Add HLA-HD, HLA*LA, xHLA tool support (v2.1.0)
Backlog.description: Integrate additional HLA typing tools into the Nextflow pipeline alongside OptiType, ArcasHLA, SpecHLA.

Backlog.title: Advanced consensus algorithms (v2.1.0)
Backlog.description: Implement beyond majority voting — weighted Bayesian consensus, tool-specific priors.

Backlog.title: Quality score integration (v2.1.0)
Backlog.description: Incorporate per-read and per-allele quality scores into consensus confidence calculation.

Backlog.title: Phasing information support (v2.1.0)
Backlog.description: Add haplotype phasing output for allele pairs across HLA genes.

Backlog.title: Interactive HTML benchmark reports (v2.1.0)
Backlog.description: Replace static SVG figures with interactive HTML dashboards for benchmarking results.

Backlog.title: Database storage support (v2.1.0)
Backlog.description: Export results to SQLite or PostgreSQL for large-cohort queries.

Backlog.title: Cloud deployment (AWS / Google Cloud) (v2.2.0)
Backlog.description: Nextflow config profiles for AWS Batch and Google Life Sciences.

Backlog.title: GUI interface (v2.2.0)
Backlog.description: Web-based job submission and result visualization UI.

Backlog.title: Real-time monitoring dashboard (v2.2.0)
Backlog.description: Live pipeline progress view integrated with Nextflow trace.

Backlog.title: Population frequency analysis (v2.2.0)
Backlog.description: Annotate HLA calls with population-level allele frequencies from IPD-IMGT/HLA.

Backlog.title: ML-based consensus calling (v3.0.0)
Backlog.description: Train a model on benchmark data to replace heuristic weighting with learned consensus.

Backlog.title: Novel allele detection (v3.0.0)
Backlog.description: Flag and report candidate novel HLA alleles not present in IMGT/HLA database.

Backlog.title: Clinical database integration (v3.0.0)
Backlog.description: Link HLA calls to transplant registries and pharmacogenomics databases.

Backlog.title: Multi-sample joint calling (v3.0.0)
Backlog.description: Population-level joint HLA inference across multiple samples.

Running.title: Manuscript writing — PIHLA ensemble paper
Running.description: Draft v1 complete (abstract, methods). Results, discussion, and figures sections in progress.

Running.title: Benchmarking on larger cohorts
Running.description: Current fixtures use 2 samples (S1, S2). Validate confidence calibration and weighted consensus on real 1000 Genomes data.

Review.title: v2.0.0 GitHub public release
Review.description: DEPLOYMENT.md checklist is ready. Repo needs final review before making public.

Done.title: Multi-tool integration (OptiType, ArcasHLA, SpecHLA)
Done.description: All three tools integrated as Nextflow DSL2 modules with container support.

Done.title: Flexible input support (BAM, CRAM, FASTQ)
Done.description: Auto-detection of input format; BAM/CRAM-to-FASTQ conversion where needed.

Done.title: Majority voting consensus module
Done.description: Confidence-weighted consensus calling across tools with abstention support.

Done.title: CSC Puhti HPC profile + SLURM script
Done.description: Full Nextflow profile for CSC Puhti; SLURM submission script with proper parameter handling fixed.

Done.title: Docker & Singularity container support
Done.description: Pre-configured container paths for CSC Puhti SIF cache; Docker profile for local runs.

Done.title: HLA region extraction & chr6 optimization
Done.description: Chromosome 6 extraction for SpecHLA; auto-detection of chr6 vs 6 naming conventions.

Done.title: Exon-only mode for SpecHLA (exome data)
Done.description: --spechla_exon_only flag implemented and documented for WES samples.

Done.title: Benchmarking framework with WES/WGS/RNA-seq fixtures
Done.description: hla_benchmark.py: per-tool accuracy, confidence calibration, Brier score, ECE. Fixtures for S1/S2 across all modalities.

Done.title: Per-tool per-gene per-modality weight learning
Done.description: Benchmark-derived weights stored as machine-readable JSON artifacts for consensus reuse.

Done.title: Manuscript figures (SVG) — 7 figures
Done.description: Accuracy comparison, per-gene gains, confidence calibration, abstention tradeoff, discordance taxonomy, confidence weights.

Done.title: Full documentation suite
Done.description: README, QUICKSTART, INSTALL_PUHTI, DEPLOYMENT checklist, CHANGELOG, PROJECT_STRUCTURE all complete.

Done.title: Pipeline execution reports (timeline, trace, DAG)
Done.description: Nextflow HTML report, timeline, trace, and DAG auto-generated on each run.

Done.title: Unit test suite with benchmark assertions
Done.description: test_hla_benchmark.py covers accuracy rates, calibration, confidence sources, resolution-aware scoring.
